content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Primes and Multiplication". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1228/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer n. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the product of all prime numbers in the given array.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check each number in the array to see if it is prime, then multiply all prime numbers together.
